title: Massachusetts Attorney General's Fair Labor Division (FLD) — Agency Landing Page
description: Scrape of the MA Attorney General's Fair Labor Division landing page. The FLD enforces wage-and-hour, prevailing-wage, and child-labor laws under M.G.L. c.149, investigating wage theft, minimum-wage violations, earned-sick-time non-compliance, and worker misclassification; enforcement yields restitution and civil penalties. Also highlights multilingual outreach and pay-transparency guidance.

source.publisher: Massachusetts Office of the Attorney General — Fair Labor Division

notes: No statute-of-limitations on this landing page; c.149 wage claims are generally subject to a 3-year limitations period. File ~9.9 KB.
